chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S– 207 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 19.01.2026 Mr. Zameer Ali Ghanghro, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with DSP Muhammad Younis >>>>>..<<<<< As per report submitted by SSP, Ghotki, six accused out of nine accused persons are facing trial; some on bail, whereas for the remaining three absconding accused persons efforts are underway for their arrest. The report is satisfactory. The purpose of petition is served. If the remaining accused persons are not arrested within reasonable time, the trial shall proceed against them u/s 87/88 CrPC. The petition is disposed of in the aforesaid terms. A copy of this order shall be transmitted to learned trial Court. Judge ARBROHI
